description: This is a satellite imagery map displaying land cover change detection in Bordeaux, France, likely between 2018 and 2021, for Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Urban Atlas (UA) products. The map features a heatmap derived from Sentinel-2 imagery, ranging from dark blue (low intensity) to light blue and yellow-green (high intensity), indicating areas of detected change using methods like Principal Component Analysis (PCA). Overlaid on this heatmap are multiple irregular polygons outlined in yellow, which represent areas identified as changed through Very High Resolution (VHR) change detection. The polygons generally correspond to the brighter, higher-intensity areas on the Sentinel-2 heatmap. A white compass rose indicates North, and a scale bar at the bottom shows a distance of 200 metres.
